ThreeOilLowCost.name: 3-Oil Low Cost+
ThreeOilLowCost.help: Use a 3-oil low-cost fleet to fight. Automatically replaces and retires the flagship when it reaches level 32.

Coalition.name: Light & Shadow Fashion - Shooting in Progress

WarArchives.name: War Archives
WarArchives.help: Due to lack of maintenance for War Archives, the clearing function may not work properly. If you find Alas running abnormally, please complete the clearing manually and then use the auto-search function.

CoalitionSp.name: Light & Shadow Fashion - Shooting in Progress SP

Island.name: Island Plan
Island.help: Requires island level 18 and unlocking the Integrated Management Panel.

Minigame.name: Mini Game
Minigame.help: Automatically collects game coins when they won't overflow. Automatically plays mini-games when there are game coins and rewards are not full.

OpsiArchive.name: Archive Coordinates
OpsiArchive.help:
Purchase archive coordinates from the Voucher Shop and run them. Archive zones do not consume action points.
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the Operation Siren main story and complete Simulation + Siren Proving Grounds
- Enable Operation Siren exploration missions or use Campaign Data Logger (5000 oil item)

OpsiScheduling.name: Smart Scheduling+
OpsiScheduling.help:
Operation Siren smart scheduling function, used to coordinate switching between Corrosion 1 leveling and gold coin replenishment tasks.
Once enabled, it will automatically switch between different tasks and send push notifications based on gold coins and action points.

OpsiCrossMonth.name: Cross-Month Daily
OpsiCrossMonth.help:
Alas will enter Operation Siren 10 minutes before the cross-month reset, wait for the reset without exiting, then complete the new day's OpSi daily, Obscured Zone, Abyssal Zone and Meowfficer Farming to earn extra rewards. When running OpSi Daily, it follows the "OpSi - Daily" task settings, and likewise for others.
    Important: Do not operate the game while Alas is waiting for the cross-month reset.

OpsiDailyDelay.name: OpSi Task Delay+
OpsiDailyDelay.help: Within a configurable time period before the daily server restart at 0:00 (default is 5 minutes, triggered at 23:55), automatically delays the currently running Corrosion 1 and Meowfficer Farming tasks until after the restart at 0:00 the next day.

Enable.name: Enable this feature
Enable.help:
Add this task to the scheduler
Commissioning, scientific research, and harvest tasks are mandatory.

NextRun.name: Next run time
NextRun.help: The value is automatically calculated and does not need to be modified manually. Will run immediately after clearing

SuccessInterval.name: After a successful run, postpone the next run for X minutes

FailureInterval.name: After a run fails, postpone the next run for X minutes

ServerUpdate.name: Server refresh time
ServerUpdate.help:
After some tasks run successfully, the next run will be postponed until the server refresh time
Automatically converts time zones, generally no modification is required

Serial.name: Emulator Serial
Serial.help:
Common simulator Serial can be found in the list below
Fill in "auto" to automatically detect the simulator. "auto" cannot be used when multiple simulators are running or an simulator that does not support automatic detection is used and must be filled in manually.

Emulator default Serial:
- Bluestack Simulator 127.0.0.1:5555
- Bluestacks Simulator 4 Hyper-v version, fill in "bluestacks4-hyperv" to automatically connect, fill in "bluestacks4-hyperv-2" for more options, and so on.
- For Bluestacks Simulator 5 Hyper-v version, fill in "bluestacks5-hyperv" to automatically connect, fill in "bluestacks5-hyperv-1" for more options, and so on.
- Night God Simulator 127.0.0.1:62001
- Night God Simulator 64-bit 127.0.0.1:59865
- MuMu Emulator/MuMu EmulatorX 127.0.0.1:7555
- MuMu Emulator 12 127.0.0.1:16384
- MuMu Pro (macOS) 127.0.0.1:16384, the order of opening is 127.0.0.1:16416, 127.0.0.1:16448...
- MEmu 127.0.0.1:21503
- Lightning emulator emulator-5554 or 127.0.0.1:5555
If you use the multi-open function of the simulator, their Serial will not be the default. You can execute `adb devices` query in console.bat, or fill it in according to the official tutorial of the simulator.

PackageName.name: game server
PackageName.help: When multiple game clients are installed on the emulator, you need to manually select the server

ServerName.name: In-game server
ServerName.help:
Select the server where the game is located to enable server status detection
Suspend until resumed during server maintenance or network unavailability

ScreenshotMethod.name: Emulator Screenshot Method
ScreenshotMethod.help:
When using auto-select, a performance test will be performed and automatically changed to the fastest screenshot method
General speed: DroidCast_raw >> aScreenCap_nc > ADB_nc >>> aScreenCap > uiautomator2 ~= ADB
Run Tools - Performance Test to find the fastest method

ControlMethod.name: Emulator Control Method
ControlMethod.help:
Speed: minitouch > Hermit >>> uiautomator2 ~= ADB
Recommended: minitouch. Not recommended: Hermit unless running under vmos.

ScreenshotDedithering.name: Remove Image Color Dithering
ScreenshotDedithering.help: Enable when running on a real device

AdbRestart.name: Try Restarting ADB When Device Not Detected

_info.name: Simulator settings
_info.help: The following values ​​​​are automatically filled in based on Serial. If you do not understand, please do not modify it at will. Modifying the port will automatically start the corresponding instance.

HandleError.name: Enable exception handling
HandleError.help: Handle some exceptions and retreat when an error occurs.

SaveError.name: When an error occurs, save the log and screenshots

StrictRestart.name: Prohibit restarting when errors occur in sensitive tasks
StrictRestart.help:
Stop Alas when an error occurs while running sensitive tasks instead of restarting the game
Sensitive tasks include hidden sea areas, abyssal sea areas, and cross-month daily tasks.

SaveErrorCount.name: Error Log storage upper limit
SaveErrorCount.help: Error logs exceeding the upper limit will be deleted. If it is 0 or a negative value, there is no limit.

OnePushConfig.name: Wrong push settings
OnePushConfig.help: After an unhandled exception occurs, use Onepush to push an error message. See the documentation for configuration methods: https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/Onepush-configuration-%5BCN%5D

ScreenshotLength.name: On error, keep the last X screenshots

GameStuckRestart.name: Restart the emulator when the game freezes
GameStuckRestart.help: After the game freezes (triggers GameStuckError) for the specified number of times, try restarting the emulator. It may help solve problems such as emulator freeze or memory overflow.

GameStuckThreshold.name: Game stuck restart threshold
GameStuckThreshold.help: How many consecutive times it is stuck before triggering a restart.

AdbOfflineRestart.name: Restart the emulator when the device is not detected
AdbOfflineRestart.help: After the device cannot be detected continuously (ADB is offline or the connection fails) for the specified number of times, try to restart the emulator.

AdbOfflineThreshold.name: Device restart threshold not detected
AdbOfflineThreshold.help: The number of times the device cannot be detected in a row triggers a restart.

ScreenshotInterval.name: Slow Down Screenshot Speed to X Seconds per Frame
ScreenshotInterval.help: Minimum interval between two screenshots, limited to 0.1 ~ 0.3. Can reduce CPU usage on high-spec computers.

CombatScreenshotInterval.name: Slow Down Combat Screenshot Speed to X Seconds per Frame
CombatScreenshotInterval.help: Minimum interval between two screenshots, limited to 0.3 ~ 1.0. Can reduce CPU usage during combat.

TaskHoardingDuration.name: Hoard Tasks for X Minutes
TaskHoardingDuration.help:
Can reduce the frequency of game operations during reward collection
After a task is triggered, wait X minutes, then execute all hoarded tasks at once

WhenTaskQueueEmpty.name: When Task Queue Is Empty
WhenTaskQueueEmpty.help: Closing the game when there are no tasks can reduce CPU usage during reward collection

AzurStatsID.name: AzurStat ID
AzurStatsID.help:
The client ID declared when uploading to https://azur-stats.lyoko.io
Composed of random characters and can be modified at will

API.name: Upload Route
API.help: If users in China cannot connect to AzurStat, they can use "China Reverse Proxy"

CombatRecord.name: Combat Drop Screenshot
CombatRecord.help:
Enabling this will slow down click speed during settlement
Does not take effect in auto-search mode

TelemetryReport.name: Telemetry data reporting
TelemetryReport.help: After being enabled, CL1 statistics (anonymous data such as the number of battles and Akashi encounter probability) will be reported anonymously to the server on a regular basis. For details on ID generation, please see the source code. For statistical information https://alas.nanoda.work/

BugReport.name: Bug log reporting
BugReport.help: When enabled, bug logs will be anonymously reported to the server when an exception is encountered to help improve ID generation. See the source code for details.

_info.name: log
_info.help: It will take effect after the scheduler is restarted.

RetireMode.name: Retirement mode
RetireMode.help: If you choose to strengthen, you will fall back to one-click retirement when the strengthening materials are insufficient.

_info.name: shared mood
_info.help:
Can use the same team to complete multiple tasks
When using this function, please ensure that the fleet function of the corresponding task is to clear all single teams, and the team is a shared team.

Enable.name: Enable shared moods
Enable.help: After enabling, the shared mood will be used, and the following mood configuration will replace the original configuration.

Tasks.name: Shared mood tasks
Tasks.help:
Select tasks that use a shared mood, separated by half-width commas, such as "Main, Event, EventA"
Main Line Diagram-1: Main, Main Line Diagram-2: Main2, Main Line Diagram-3: Main3
Activity Diagram-1: Event, Activity Diagram-2: Event2, War Archives: WarArchives
Daily A chart: EventA, Daily B chart: EventB, Daily C chart: EventC, Daily D chart: EventD, Daily SP chart: EventSp

FleetOnsen.name: All members have placed hot springs (+10/h)

_info.name: Yukikaze-sama's task management
_info.help: Task-related priority and scheduling settings.

TaskPriorityAdjustment.name: Task priority adjustment
TaskPriorityAdjustment.help:
Restart # Restart the game
> OpsiCrossMonth > OpsiDailyDelay # Operation Siren Cross-Month Daily > Operation Siren Task Delay
> Commission > Tactical > Research # Commission > Tactical Academy > Research
> Exercise # Exercise
> Dorm > Meowfficer > Guild > Gacha # Backyard > Meowfficer > Guild > Daily Gacha
> Reward # Rewards
> ShopFrequent > ShopOnce > Shipyard > Freebies > Island # General Shop > Other Shops > Development Shipyard > Freebie Rewards > Island Plan
> PrivateQuarters # Quarters Plan
> OpsiExplore # Monthly Exploration
> Minigame > Awaken # Minigame > Cognitive Awakening
> OpsiAshBeacon # META Combat
> OpsiDaily > OpsiShop > OpsiVoucher # Operation Siren Daily > Port Shop > Exchange Shop
> OpsiAbyssal > OpsiStronghold > OpsiObscure > OpsiArchive # Abyssal Zone > Siren Stronghold > Obscured Zone > Archive Coordinates
> Daily > Hard > OpsiAshBeacon > OpsiAshAssist > OpsiMonthBoss # Daily Challenge > Hard Mode > META Combat > META Assist > Monthly Boss
> Sos > EventSp > EventA > EventB > EventC > EventD # SOS > Event Daily SP > Event Daily A > Event Daily B > Event Daily C > Event Daily D
> RaidDaily > CoalitionSp > WarArchives > MaritimeEscort # Raid Daily > Coalition SP > War Archives > Maritime Escort
> Event > Event2 > Raid > Hospital > HospitalEvent > Coalition > RaidScuttle > Main > Main2 > Main3 # Event Map > Event Map 2 > Raid > Hospital Event > Raid > Raid Scuttle > Main Campaign > Main Campaign 2 > Main Campaign 3
> OpsiMeowfficerFarming # Meowfficer Farming
> GemsFarming # Gems Farming
> OpsiHazard1Leveling # Corrosion 1 Leveling
> ThreeOilLowCost # 3-Oil Low Cost

_info.name: One-click retirement settings
_info.help: Only takes effect when "Retirement Mode" is set to "One-click retirement"

KeepLimitBreak.name: Keep the star-filled ship with the same name
KeepLimitBreak.help:
When there are no ships of the same name with full stars, several ships of the same name that meet the conditions for retirement will be retained.
If one-click retirement cannot be retired, please set it to "No retention"

_info.name: Harden settings
_info.help: Only takes effect when "Retirement Mode" is set to "Hardened"

ShipToEnhance.name: Ships in need of reinforcement
ShipToEnhance.favourite: Only commonly used ships are strengthened

Filter.name: Enhance filter string
Filter.help:
Format: "cv > bb > ...",
Leave blank to use the default enhancement method

CheckPerCategory.name: Number of reinforcements per category
CheckPerCategory.help:
How many ships can be enhanced at most for each ship category?
Ships in combat will be skipped and not counted,
Prioritize whether there are strengthening materials

_info.name: Traditional decommissioning setup
_info.help:
Only takes effect when "Retirement Mode" is set to "Legacy Retirement"
NOTE: Traditional retirement based on character rarity, possible retirement of Bree

Name.name: Level name (enter 7-2-3 to retreat using 7-2 three battles)
Name.help:
For example, 7-2, 12-4, D3, SP4, case-insensitive
If the level is missing, please wait for the update

Event.name: Activity name
Event.event_20200507_cn: The Way Home in the Night
Event.event_20200521_en: Iris of Light and Dark Rerun
Event.event_20200806_cn: The Enigma and the Shark Rerun
Event.event_20200820_cn: Scherzo of Iron and Blood Rerun
Event.event_20211028_tw: 復刻光與影的鳶尾之華
Event.event_20220526_cn: Pledge of the Radiant Court Rerun
Event.event_20221124_cn: The Alchemist and the Archipelago of Secrets Rerun
Event.event_20231026_cn: Tempesta and the Fountain of Youth
Event.event_20250520_cn: A Rose on the High Tower
Event.event_20250724_cn: The Alchemist and the Tower of Horizons
Event.raid_20200624: Air Raid Drills with Essex Rerun
Event.war_archives_20180726_cn: archives Iris of Light and Dark
Event.war_archives_20200507_cn: archives The Way Home in the Night
Event.war_archives_20200806_cn: archives The Enigma and the Shark
Event.war_archives_20200820_cn: archives Scherzo of Iron and Blood
Event.war_archives_20200903_cn: archives Stars of the Shimmering Fjord
Event.war_archives_20220526_cn: archives Pledge of the Radiant Court
Event.war_archives_20231026_cn: archives Tempesta and the Fountain of Youth

Use2xBook.name: Use High Efficiency Combat Manual
Use2xBook.help: Double oil consumption, double drop settlement

UseRecommendFleet.name: Auto Fleet Composition
UseRecommendFleet.help: Use the game's built-in recommended fleet to automatically compose hard mode fleets

_info.name: Stop Condition
_info.help: Stop the task after any of the following conditions are triggered

OilLimit.name: Delay When Oil Falls Below X
OilLimit.help: Delay the task when oil is too low, continue sortie when oil is sufficient

RunCount.name: Stop After Sortie Count Exceeds X
RunCount.help:
Each run decreases the count by one, task stops when it reaches zero
0 means no limit

MapAchievement.name: Stop After Achieving Map Completion
MapAchievement.help:
Achieve 100% map clear, achieve 3-star clear, achieve safe sea area,
or achieve safe sea area without getting 3 stars then stop
MapAchievement.non_stop_clear_all: Don’t Stop + Full Clear Every Run

StageIncrease.name: Auto-Progress After Achieving Map Completion
StageIncrease.help:
Automatically progresses to next stage. Ensure your fleet is strong enough and meets stage attribute requirements. Set "Stop After Achieving Map Completion" accordingly.
For example, turn on this option and select "100% Clear", it will proceed to the next stage after 100% completion.
Supported maps: 1-1 to 15-4, A1 to A3, B1 to B3, C1 to C3, D1 to D3, T1 to T6, SP1 to SP4

ReachLevel.name: Stop When Ship Reaches Level X
ReachLevel.help:
Any ship below level X will stop after reaching level X
0 means no level restriction

Fleet1Step.name: Fleet 1 Step Size
Fleet1Step.help: Limit movement distance in event maps

Fleet2Step.name: Fleet 2 Step Size
Fleet2Step.help: Limit movement distance in event maps

FleetOrder.name: Fleet Role
FleetOrder.help:
Without auto-search, will pick up question marks and ammo.
When fighting 4 battles or fewer without auto-search, uses "one fleet clears, other fleet on standby".

Mode.name: Submarine Attack Mode
Mode.help: Only takes effect when auto-search is off. Note: 'Hunt and Boss' combines 'Hunt Only' and 'Boss Only' - submarines will hunt during mob battles and be summoned during boss battles.

AutoSearchMode.name: Submarine Auto-Search Mode
AutoSearchMode.help: Only takes effect when using auto-search

DistanceToBoss.name: Move Submarine Near Boss Before Boss Battle
DistanceToBoss.help:
Only takes effect when "Submarine Attack Mode" is "Boss Only" or "Hunt and Boss"
Selecting "X tiles from Boss" requires ensuring the submarine hunting range covers the Boss. Distance is calculated using Manhattan distance. Selecting "Use Open Ocean Support" requires U-522/Da Vinci in the submarine fleet.

Mode.name: Morale Mode
Mode.calculate_ignore: Calculate Morale + Ignore Low Morale Warning

Fleet1Onsen.name: All Fleet 1 Members Have Hot Spring (+10/h)

Fleet2Onsen.name: All Fleet 2 Members Have Hot Spring (+10/h)

_info.name: HP Control
_info.help: Only takes effect when fleet lock is off

UseHpBalance.name: Enable HP Balance
UseHpBalance.help: Move ships with low HP to protected positions, and ships with high HP to damage-taking positions.

HpBalanceThreshold.name: Swap Positions When Vanguard HP Difference Exceeds X

HpBalanceWeight.name: Vanguard HP Weight
HpBalanceWeight.help:
Modify if there are differences in vanguard tankiness. Format:
1000, 1000, 1000

RepairUseSingleThreshold.name: Use Emergency Repair When Any Ship HP Falls Below X

RepairUseMultiThreshold.name: Use Emergency Repair When All Ships HP Fall Below X

LowHpRetreatThreshold.name: When the HP of any ship falls below X, retreat

_info.name: Enemy Priority
_info.help: Customize the priority of enemies to fight

EnemyScaleBalanceWeight.name: Enemy Priority
EnemyScaleBalanceWeight.help: First clear enemies on the main route to Boss, then clear others by priority.

_info.name: 1-1 Ambush Affinity Farming
_info.help: After entering 1-1, repeatedly jump near C1

_info.name: 7-2 3-Battle Mystery Farming
_info.help: Fight three battles, then retreat after collecting mystery nodes

StepOnA3.name: Use Fleet 2 to Step on A3
StepOnA3.help: Can effectively prevent A2's mystery node from being blocked.

_info.name: 12-2 Medium Leveling
_info.help:
Use a low-power fleet to level up at 12-2, retreat after defeating non-3-star enemies.
Increase EXP/oil ratio by reducing fleet power

_info.name: 12-4 Large Leveling
_info.help:
Use a strong fleet to level up at 12-4, retreat after defeating 3-star enemies.
Increase EXP/oil ratio by defeating more 3-star enemies

NonLargeEnterTolerance.name: After entering the map, X fights no three-star enemies and retreats.

NonLargeRetreatTolerance.name: Fight up to X non-three-star enemies

PickupAmmo.name: Pick Up Ammo After X Battles

_info.name: Urgent Commission Farming
_info.help:
Warning: This feature allows players to obtain a small amount of diamonds, but is not an efficient way to obtain diamonds.
Players who have been playing Azur Lane for a short time can easily become superstitious about zero breakage and low consumption, while neglecting character development.
Running this function will only make you feel very fulfilled, but your account will actually have zero improvement.
The main purpose of this function is to allow players with a formed lineup to obtain additional Rubik's Cubes. Please treat diamonds rationally as a by-product.

This feature will replace the flagship after flagship level 32
Regarding the emergency commission refresh mechanism, you can read https://bbs.nga.cn/read.php?tid=27134956
Commissioned fuel consumption ratio: A3 > A1 > 2-4 > 2-1. It is recommended to choose the activity diagram when there is an activity diagram. 2-1 will pick the question mark to have more supplies.
One team will complete all battles. The front row should be level 100 zero-break destroyer with output equipment, and the back row should be level 33 and below white-skin zero-break aircraft carriers.
The second team should provide cross-team support (cross-team barrage, cross-team assistance)

When the fleet function cannot be set, the mission should be stopped in the following ways to avoid cross-team attacks and a large amount of oil being consumed:
If error push is set, a task stop message will be pushed and the task will be stopped.
If error push is not set, Alas will be stopped directly.

ChangeFlagship.name: Change Flagship
ChangeFlagship.help:
Change flagship when flagship level >= 32 or red face
Look for white-skinned aircraft carriers with levels between 1-31, and choose replacement flagships when they retire. All white-skinned aircraft carriers with levels greater than level 1 will be considered decommissioned targets. Please be sure to target ships that are not targets. Change flagship equipment when changing ships, this is done by recording the previous equipment.

Changing equipment will only change the slot in the equipment, even white equipment will be changed. If a flagship is specified, all 5 equipment will be replaced. If a flagship is not specified, only the equipment will be replaced.

CommonCVFilter.name: Custom Flagship Carrier Filter
CommonCVFilter.help:
To use a custom filter, you need to set "Specify Flagship Carrier" to "Custom", and the flagship carrier will be selected first for replacement according to the order of the filter.
bogue: Borg ranger: raider langley: Langley hermes: athletic god

ChangeVanguard.name: Change Vanguard
ChangeVanguard.help:
Change the front row when the front row is red. If you choose not to change, the red face will be forced to attack.
To change the front row, you need to find a white eagle or iron-blooded white-skin ship with a mood of no less than 10 and a level of 100 to drive away, so try to ensure that there are enough to drive away. Outside the national server, it is the level 70 White Eagle White Ship Expulsion.

CommonDDFilter.name: Custom front row filter
CommonDDFilter.help:
To use a custom filter, you need to set "Specify Front Row" to "Custom", and the front row will be replaced first according to the filter order.
z20：Z20 z21：Z21 aulick：Aulick foote：Foot cassin：Cassin downes：Downs

EquipmentCode.name: Equipment code
EquipmentCode.help:
Only takes effect when "Change Ship + Equipment" is selected.
When changing a ship, if the current ship equipment code in the settings is null, it will be exported; when changing a ship, if the current ship equipment code in the settings is null, the equipment code exported from the previous ship will be used, otherwise the equipment code in the settings will be used.
Bluestacks simulator users need to enable the virtual keyboard first. For details, see https://support.bluestacks.com/hc/zh-tw/articles/360061968892-%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E5%9C% A8-BlueStacks-5-%E4%B8%8A%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E5%B0%8F%E9%8D%B5%E7%9B%A4-%E8%99%9B%E6%93%AC%E9%8D%B5%E7%9B%A4
DD: front row expulsion bogue: Borg hermes: athletic god langley: Langley ranger: raider

ALLowHighFlagshipLevel.name: Only replace the full-level rear row
ALLowHighFlagshipLevel.help:
After opening, only level 100 white-skin light aircraft will be selected when changing flagships.
Please make sure there are qualified ships in the dock when using it.

ALLowLowVanguardLevel.name: Replaceable low-level front row
ALLowLowVanguardLevel.help: After opening, the front row level limit is changed to level 30 or above. If it is difficult mode (such as the CD picture), it will be changed to level 70.

DelayTaskIFNoFlagship.name: Postpone mission when there is no replacement flagship
DelayTaskIFNoFlagship.help: When changing the flagship, if a white aircraft carrier that meets the conditions cannot be found, the mission will be postponed.

CommissionLimit.name: Prevent the number of emergency commissions from being too large
CommissionLimit.help: To prevent the number of emergency orders from being too large and unable to complete daily orders when running 7x24, it is recommended to select only short-term high-yield orders in the order filter.

PtLimit.name: Event PT Limit
PtLimit.help:
When accumulated PT reaches the given value, all event tasks are disabled. 0 means no limit. Cannot trigger immediately when using auto-search.
After enabling, you only need to open all event tasks without counting total runs.

TimeLimit.name: Event Time Limit
TimeLimit.help:
When local time exceeds the given value, all event tasks are disabled. '2020-01-01 00:00:00' means no limit. Timer resets after triggering once.
After setting, prevents forgetting to close tasks after an event ends.

_info.name: Task Balance Settings
_info.help: Prevent coins from being too low when running event maps

Enable.name: Enable Task Balancing
Enable.help: When enabled, coin amount will be checked after each sortie

TaskCall.name: Call Task X When Coins Are Low
TaskCall.help: Note: Players need to set up the called task in advance, otherwise it won't work

LastStage.name: Last Completed Stage
LastStage.help: Automatically updated value that skips completed stages in the filter, resets after midnight.

_info.name: Fight together and sink the ship
Fighting together every day
_info.help: Complete daily battles on easy and normal difficulty

UseRecommendFleet.name: Use Fleet Recommendations
UseRecommendFleet.help: If turned off, you need to manually team up all 15 levels in advance

_info.name: merchant ship escort
_info.help: If you enter and then retreat, you can get about 70% of the reward.

_info.name: Activity settings
_info.help: Teams must be manually allocated in the game before going out.

Mode.name: difficulty
Mode.help: SP graph needs to be run using active daily SP

PresetFilter.name: Active store filter
PresetFilter.help: Generally, the default is to buy all

CustomFilter.name: Custom filters
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, you need to set the "Activity Store Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

PresetFilter.name: delegate filter
PresetFilter.help:
If you do not have enough understanding of the output and benefits of the commission, it is not recommended to write a custom filter. It is recommended to use a pre-optimized commission filter.
If you run the brush emergency commission function 24 hours a day, you should use the filter (7x24 brush commission).
It is not recommended to use the oil priority filter while running the emergency commission function.

CustomFilter.name: Custom delegate filter
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, you need to set "Delegated Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

DoMajorCommission.name: Make the main commission (1200 oil/1000 oil commission)
DoMajorCommission.help: The 1200 oil commission is now obsolete and the yield is very low. It is recommended to close it.

RapidTrainingSlot.name: Use quick learning
RapidTrainingSlot.help: During the event, there are 10 quick skill learning sessions per day

_info.name: Overflow experience control
_info.help:
Prevent the use of advanced skill books from overflowing a large amount of experience when skills are almost at full level.
For example, if the T3 book overflows by 100 points and the T4 book overflows by 100 points, when there are 1100 experience points left, the T4 book will not be used and the T3 book will be used instead.

T4Allow.name: Allow T4 skill book to overflow X experience points

T3Allow.name: Allow T3 skill book to overflow X experience points

T2Allow.name: Allow T2 skill book to overflow X experience points

T1Allow.name: Allow T1 skill book to overflow X experience points

_info.name: learn new skills
_info.help: When there is a vacant position in the Tactics Academy, a ship girl will be automatically assigned and will learn the first skill that is not yet full level.

_info.name: Research
_info.help:
When filters work with other settings, Alas looks for items that satisfy all user settings simultaneously.
For example, if you set the research filter to `H1 > D2.5 > shortest` (including research that consumes cubes), but also set it not to allow cube consumption, the final result is that Alas will not select research that consumes cubes. When you suddenly want to use cubes, you only need to enable cube consumption without modifying the filter, which is more convenient.

AllowDelay.name: Delay research when resources are insufficient
AllowDelay.help:
When resources are insufficient, Alas will delay research until conditions are met or the research queue is about to be cleared, which will not cause research to stop.
If resources remain insufficient for a long time or Alas is not running long enough, you can disable this option to keep the research queue full.

PresetFilter.name: Research filter
PresetFilter.help: For research drops and project refreshes, please see https://azur-stats.lyoko.io/. People who do not have a basic understanding of these are not recommended to write custom filters. It is recommended to use pre-optimized research filters.

CustomFilter.name: Custom research filters
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, you need to set "Research Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

BuyFood.name: Automatically purchase food
BuyFood.help: For status display only. Disable setting. Do not ask anything about this switch.

_info.name: Event furniture setup
_info.help: Purchase limited-time furniture from the Backyard Furniture Shop during events

BuyOption.name: Purchase option
BuyOption.help:
Buy a set: buy one of each furniture piece; Buy all: buy all furniture up to the limit. Both options will remove the furniture set from the front of the furniture shop. If you buy a set, remaining furniture needs to be purchased manually.
There is not much difference in furniture cost between the two options, so buying all is recommended. Will not buy diamond furniture

LastRun.name: Last check time
LastRun.help: Record the time of the last check to prevent the task from running repeatedly. The check interval is 6 days. This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

BuyAmount.name: Buy X cat boxes every day
BuyAmount.help: The first cat box of the day is free

Mode.name: Training mode
Mode.help:
Seamless Meowfficer Training will collect Meowfficers every 2.5 ~ 3.5 hours.
Collect one per day means collect one every day, collect all on Sunday, enhance and refill the queue to complete weekly missions

RetainTalentedGold.name: Lock golden Meowfficers with special talents
RetainTalentedGold.help: Lock Meowfficers with special talents when collecting. Locked Meowfficers will not be used for enhancement. Users need to manually check and unlock unnecessary ones.

RetainTalentedPurple.name: Lock purple Meowfficers with special talents
RetainTalentedPurple.help: Lock Meowfficers with special talents when collecting. Locked Meowfficers will not be used for enhancement. Users need to manually check and unlock unnecessary ones.

EnhanceIndex.name: Use Meowfficers without special talents to enhance the Xth Meowfficer
EnhanceIndex.help: The Xth Meowfficer in the Meowfficer storage, limited to 1 ~ 12, in order from upper left to lower right

MaxFeedLevel.name: Do not use Meowfficers above level X as enhancement material

Enable.name: Enable Guild Logistics
Enable.help: Receive guild missions, submit preparation materials, and receive fleet rewards

SelectNewMission.name: Select new weekly fleet mission
SelectNewMission.help:
This account needs to be the fleet commander or deputy commander to enable.
By default, Siren Annihilation III, which is the easiest to complete, is selected. The mission is to sink 300 enemy ships.

ExchangeFilter.name: Preparation item filter
ExchangeFilter.help: Generally no modification is needed, prioritize the one with the least consumption

SelectNewOperation.name: Start a new Guild Operation
SelectNewOperation.help:
This account needs to be the fleet commander or deputy commander to enable.
By default, the Guadalcanal Island Sea and Air Battle with the most rewards is selected.

NewOperationMaxDate.name: After the Xth day of each month, no new Guild Operations will be started
NewOperationMaxDate.help:
Only takes effect when "Start a new Guild Operation" is enabled.
It is not recommended to start three Guild Operations per month, because each player can only participate twice a month, and most members cannot participate in the dispatch of the third operation. This will affect the evaluation of dispatch events, resulting in reduced final rewards.

JoinThreshold.name: Only join Guild Operation when progress > X
JoinThreshold.help: 0.0 ~ 1.0. For example, '0.5' means to join only when the combat progress is less than half, and '1' means to join directly regardless of the progress.

BossFleetRecommend.name: Use recommended fleet to attack BOSS
BossFleetRecommend.help: Recommended to disable and set up your own fleet

_info.name: Cognitive Awakening
_info.help: Cognitive Awaken all ships in the dock until Cognitive Chips are exhausted

BuySkinBox.name: Buy appearance equipment box
BuySkinBox.help: To reduce maintenance costs, the appearance box selector in the filter will not be updated with the game, but Alas will treat any unknown item with a quantity of 1 and consuming 7000 supplies as an appearance box and purchase it.

ConsumeCoins.name: Consumption of overflow supplies
ConsumeCoins.help: When the supplies exceed 550,000, purchase all items that consume supplies.

Refresh.name: Refresh Shop
Refresh.help: Refreshing costs 50 Guild coins. Guild coins are not very valuable, it is recommended to enable.

_info.name: Rainbow Research blueprint purchase settings
_info.help: Buy Rainbow Research blueprints every day. Rainbow and Gold Research blueprint discounts are counted independently, and you can get 2 of each for free every day.

ShipIndex.name: Ship index
ShipIndex.help: Counting from left to right, starting from 1

BuyAmount.name: Purchase amount
BuyAmount.help: The first two blueprints every day are free

LastRun.name: Last purchase time
LastRun.help: Because the game does not display how many blueprints have been purchased today, the time of the last purchase is recorded here to prevent the task from running repeatedly. This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

ShipIndex.name: Ship index
ShipIndex.help: Counting from left to right, starting from 1

BuyAmount.name: Purchase quantity
BuyAmount.help: The first two tickets every day are free

LastRun.name: Last purchase time
LastRun.help: Because the game does not display how many tickets have been purchased today, the time of the last purchase is recorded here to prevent the task from running repeatedly. This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

_info.name: Daily Construction
_info.help: Build ships to complete daily missions. Building once in the Light pool daily saves 200 Coins.

UseTicket.name: Use single build permit
UseTicket.help: When enabled, pools that support build permits will use them first. When no permits are available or building in a standard pool, Cubes will be used instead.

UseDrill.name: Use Quick Finisher to complete construction
UseDrill.help: If set to No, ships will be launched tomorrow instead, saving one Quick Finisher.

ForceCollect.name: Force collect Data Key
ForceCollect.help: When Data Keys are full, force collect (remove the red dot)

DayOfWeek.name: Extend to which day of the week
DayOfWeek.help: It is recommended to set it to weekdays (Monday to Friday) to avoid missing purchases

BuyRoses.name: Buy weekly roses
BuyRoses.help:
The number of rose purchases is reset every Monday.
Each run will try to purchase them all at once. If Coins are insufficient (less than 24K), the purchase will be canceled and postponed to the next day.

BuyCake.name: Buy weekly cake gift box
BuyCake.help:
The number of cake gift box purchases resets every Monday.
Each run will try to purchase them all at once. If gems are insufficient (less than 210 gems), the purchase will be canceled and postponed to the next day.

TargetInteract.name: Clear daily energy
TargetInteract.help: Interact with the selected ship to clear today’s energy

TargetShip.name: Choose a ship to interact with daily
TargetShip.help: Choose the ship you want to interact with on a daily basis

UseDailySkip.name: Use Quick Challenge
UseDailySkip.help: After getting S rank on the daily stage, sweep is unlocked. If not unlocked, it will automatically fall back to the traditional sortie.

SupplyLineDisruption.name: Supply Line Disruption (Submarine)
SupplyLineDisruption.help: Quick Challenge needs to be unlocked, otherwise it will be skipped

_info.name: Hard Mode
_info.help: Running daily Hard mode requires clearing mode to be unlocked. Before unlocking, use the main campaign function instead.

_info.name: Exercise
_info.help: Run Exercise, automatically retreat when HP is too low

DelayUntilHoursBeforeNextUpdate.name: Delay Exercise until X hours before next refresh

ExerciseStrategy.name: Exercise strategy
ExerciseStrategy.help: If you reserve 5 attempts, you will try to push for marshal rank at the set time, and all attempts will be cleared after the refresh at 18:00 on Sunday.

LowHpThreshold.name: Retreat when HP drops below X

LowHpConfirmWait.name: After HP falls below threshold, wait X seconds before retreating
LowHpConfirmWait.help: Recommended 1.0 ~ 3.0, because the character portrait may cover the HP bar, so a brief confirmation period is needed.

OpponentRefreshValue.name: Exercise opponents refreshed X times today
OpponentRefreshValue.help:
Automatically updated value, resets at midnight.
If you manually refresh opponents, you should update this value.

_info.name: META Assist
_info.help: Beacon assist three times a day

Tier.name: Find beacons with level greater than X
Tier.help: If you try several times and still can't find a beacon that meets the criteria, fight a random one.

_info.name: Operation Siren General Settings
_info.help: All Operation Siren features use these settings

UseLogger.name: Use Coordinate Logger
UseLogger.help: Every time you enter the storage, use all Coordinate Loggers

BuyActionPointLimit.name: Buy Action Points X times
BuyActionPointLimit.help: Maximum number of times to buy Action Points

OilLimit.name: When buying AP, keep X Oil

RepairThreshold.name: Return to port for repair when any ship HP is below X

UseRepairPack.name: Use Repair Toolkit to repair ships
UseRepairPack.help: When enabled, Repair Toolkits from storage will be used to repair ships. Recommended to use with Corrosion 1 leveling.

RepairPackThreshold.name: Use Repair Toolkit when any ship HP is below X
RepairPackThreshold.help:
Only takes effect when "Use Repair Toolkit to repair ships" is enabled.
Only attempts repair after defeating Abyssal, Siren Stronghold, and Monthly Boss.
0.0 ~ 1.0

DoRandomMapEvent.name: Complete random map events
DoRandomMapEvent.help: After completing Auto-Search, scan the map again to purchase from Akashi Shop, use Siren information collection device, use Siren detection device, and unlock two-fleet mechanisms.

AkashiShopFilter.name: Shop Filter
AkashiShopFilter.help: By default, only Action Points are purchased nanoda. If you want to buy purple coins, set to 'ActionPoint > PurpleCoins'

NotifyOpsiMail.name: Push Operation Siren notifications
NotifyOpsiMail.help: Push notifications about Corrosion 1 and Meowfficer farming. Requires the "Error Push" function to be enabled. May be noisy due to high volume of messages.

OneHitMode.name: Hit and run
OneHitMode.help:
Only attack each beacon once, then call for assist every half hour.
Does not work on Dossier beacons.

DossierAutoAttackMode.name: Dossier Beacon Auto Combat
DossierAutoAttackMode.help: Automatically fight after the first battle at the Dossier beacon. Currently only available on CN Server.

RequestAssist.name: Request assist
RequestAssist.help:
Before fighting a beacon, request assist from friends, guild, and world.
Does not work on Dossier beacons.

EnsureFullyCollected.name: Ensure collecting 200 beacon data per day
EnsureFullyCollected.help: Before collection is full, the AP reserve setting is temporarily ignored. Requires "Meowfficer Farming" to be enabled.

AutoCollectShip.name: Automatically obtain new META ships
AutoCollectShip.help: New META ships will be automatically obtained when collecting rewards. When disabled, the "Click to Sync" button will not be clicked and must be collected manually.

Filter.name: Sortie Fleet Filter
Filter.help:
Fight the BOSS in rotation. If one fleet dies, replace it with another.
Please make sure the fleet is strong enough to ultimately defeat the BOSS.
Use "CallSubmarine" to call a submarine before combat, but the run interval will be increased to 60 minutes.

Submarine.name: Call submarine
Submarine.help: When enabled, the running interval will increase to 60 minutes

_info.name: Operation Siren Explore
_info.help:
Explore all sea zones in Operation Siren at the beginning of each month, without needing to buy a Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item).
This function will clear a sea zone every 27 minutes to ensure airspace search cooldown.
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Complete Operation Siren main story and finish Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground

SpecialRadar.name: Campaign Information Recorder has been purchased (5000 Oil item)
SpecialRadar.help:
The Campaign Information Recorder is not required.
Cannot be checked if not purchased and used.

ForceRun.name: Force run regardless of run interval
ForceRun.help: When enabled, it will consume additional AP. Generally not needed, just take it slowly.

IfSkipSirenResearch.name: Skip Siren Research Device
IfSkipSirenResearch.help:
When enabled, Siren Research Devices of the corresponding coordinate level will be skipped to facilitate bug exploitation.
Preliminary testing in several sea zones has been done, but a full monthly exploration has not been completed. Unknown issues may exist.

SkipedSirenResearch.name: Sea zones with skipped Siren Research Devices
SkipedSirenResearch.help:
This value is automatically recorded and does not need to be modified manually.
It will be reset when exploring at the beginning of the month, or when "Last completed zone" is changed to 0 and monthly exploration is run again.

LastZone.name: Last completed zone
LastZone.help:
Automatically updated value. Fill in 0 to reset progress. After reset, already explored sea zones will be automatically skipped.
Supports sea zone ID, CN/EN/JP/TW server zone names, e.g. "51", "NA Ocean SE Sector E"

_info.name: Operation Siren Shop
_info.help:
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Complete Operation Siren main story and finish Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable Operation Siren exploration or use Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item)
- The month after completing Operation Siren main story, i.e. when the Port Shop becomes the new version.

PresetFilter.name: Port Shop filter
PresetFilter.help:
Generally the default is sufficient. If free vouchers overflow, select "High value items and META materials". For beginners, select "Do not purchase META materials" which buys everything except META materials.
High-value items are AP, coordinates, and gold or higher tier products; META materials include META general tactical textbooks and 4 types of enhancement materials.
PresetFilter.max_benefit_meta: High value items and META materials

CustomFilter.name: Custom filter
CustomFilter.help: To use a custom filter, set "Port Shop Filter" to "Custom" and read https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/filter_string_cn

DisableBeforeDate.name: Do not purchase from Operation Siren Shop before the Xth day of each month
DisableBeforeDate.help:
Starting from the day after the specified date, buy from Operation Siren Shop once a day.
0 means no limit, buy every day.

_info.name: Special Exchange Shop (Monthly Voucher Shop)
_info.help:
Purchase from the monthly voucher shop.
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Complete Operation Siren main story and finish Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground

_info.name: Operation Siren Daily
_info.help:
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the Operation Siren main storyline and complete Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable Operation Siren Exploration mission or use the Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item)

DoMission.name: Do Operation Siren dailies
DoMission.help: Pick up dailies at port and complete all dailies

UseTuningSample.name: Use Tuning Samples
UseTuningSample.help: Use all six Tuning Samples and the strong Tuning Sample

SkipSirenResearchMission.name: Skip Siren Research missions
SkipSirenResearchMission.help:
When enabled, "Siren Research I" and "Siren Research II" missions will be skipped.
Siren Research missions exchange yellow coins for purple coins.

KeepMissionZone.name: Keep sea zone without clearing
KeepMissionZone.help:
Exit the sea zone after completing the daily. Next time a mission appears in the same zone, no AP is needed to enter.
All uncleaned zones will be cleaned on the last day of every month.

MissionZones.name: Sea zones to be cleaned at month end
MissionZones.help: This value is automatically recorded and generally does not need to be modified.

_info.name: Obscured Zone
_info.help:
Clear an Obscured Zone every 27 minutes to ensure the zone search cooldown
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the Operation Siren main storyline and complete Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable Operation Siren Exploration mission or use the Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item)

SkipHazard2Obscure.name: Skip Corrosion Level 2 Coordinates
SkipHazard2Obscure.help: When enabled, Obscured Zones with Corrosion Level 2 will not be cleared.

ForceRun.name: Force Run Ignoring Interval
ForceRun.help: When enabled, it will consume additional Action Points. Generally not needed, just run it slowly.

_info.name: Abyssal Zone
_info.help:
Clear the Abyssal Zone coordinates in inventory
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the Operation Siren main storyline and complete Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable Operation Siren Exploration mission or use the Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item)

ForceRun.name: Force Run Ignoring Interval
ForceRun.help: When enabled, it will consume additional Action Points. Generally not needed, just run it slowly.

_info.name: Siren Stronghold
_info.help:
Clear the weekly Siren Stronghold
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the Operation Siren main storyline and complete Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable Operation Siren Exploration mission or use the Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item)

SubmarineEveryCombat.name: Submarine Sortie Every Battle
SubmarineEveryCombat.help: When enabled, if there is a submarine fleet in the sortie fleet filter and the submarine fleet runs out of ammo, it will exit the Siren Stronghold and postpone the mission.

ForceRun.name: Force Run Ignoring Interval
ForceRun.help: When enabled, it will consume additional Action Points. Generally not needed, just run it slowly.

_info.name: Monthly Boss
_info.help:
Clear the (Normal/Hard) Monthly Boss. On Normal difficulty, will continue attacking until defeated. On Hard difficulty, will terminate the task directly upon failure.
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the Operation Siren main storyline and complete Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable Operation Siren Exploration mission or use the Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item)

CheckAdaptability.name: Only fight BOSS when adaptability is above 203/203/156

ForceRun.name: Force Run Ignoring Interval
ForceRun.help: When enabled, it will consume additional Action Points. Generally not needed, just run it slowly.

_info.name: Meowfficer Farming
_info.help:
Attack sea zones with designated Corrosion levels in clockwise order
The following conditions must be met before using this feature:
- Clear the Operation Siren main storyline and complete Simulation Battle + Siren Proving Ground
- Enable Operation Siren Exploration mission or use the Campaign Information Recorder (5000 Oil item)

ActionPointPreserve.name: Preserve X Action Points
ActionPointPreserve.help:
Stop when Action Points are lower than X, and automatically open Action Point boxes. X includes Action Points in boxes. It is recommended to preserve 3000 AP for Corrosion 1 Leveling.
This value will be automatically reduced to 200 points 3 days before Operation Siren reset. If Corrosion 1 Leveling is enabled, it will be changed to 1000 points, and will be automatically reduced to 0 points on the last day.

HazardLevel.name: Corrosion Level
HazardLevel.help:
Attack sea zones with specific Corrosion levels in clockwise order
It is recommended to choose 5 or 3, which has a higher cat point/AP ratio.

TargetZone.name: Target Zone
TargetZone.help:
Only attack designated sea zones, can be used to obtain Operation Siren achievement stars.
Supports zone ID, CN/EN/JP/TW zone names, e.g. "51", "NA Ocean SE Sector E"
Fill in default value 0, or delete the value to cancel

StayInZone.name: Planned Operation in Target Zone
StayInZone.help: Warm reminder from Yukikaze-sama: After enabling this and specifying a zone, planned operations will be carried out in the designated zone without returning to port nanoda! For Corrosion 3, NA Ocean SE B is recommended; for Corrosion 5, Caribbean Sea B or C is recommended nanoda!

APPreserveUntilReset.name: Preserve Action Points Until End of Month
APPreserveUntilReset.help:
'Preserve X Action Points' setting will no longer decrease before Operation Siren reset.
Note: Once enabled, these AP will only be consumed in cross-month daily tasks. This setting is invalid when cross-month daily tasks are not enabled, which means you need to manually use these AP to obtain higher benefits.

SirenDetectorSearch_Enable.name: Auto Search Siren Detection Device
SirenDetectorSearch_Enable.help:
Automatically search for Siren Detection Devices during the Meowfficer Farming mission and record found zones
Only searches in the Central Sea Zone (region 5), not in other regions

SirenDetectorSearch_HazardLevel.name: Siren Detection Device Corrosion Level
SirenDetectorSearch_HazardLevel.help:
In the Central Sea Zone, search zones with specific Corrosion levels clockwise to find Siren Detection Devices.
The Central Sea Zone only has Level 5 and Level 6 zones.
Note: Only selects Central Sea Zone (region 5), zones in other regions will not be selected.

SirenDetectorSearch_FleetForBlock.name: Blocking Fleet
SirenDetectorSearch_FleetForBlock.help: Fleet used to block enemies to avoid being interrupted during search. Please choose a different fleet from the Meowfficer Farming mission.

SirenDetectorSearch_StopAfterFound.name: Stop After Finding X Siren Detection Devices
SirenDetectorSearch_StopAfterFound.help:
After finding and recording the specified number of Siren Detection Devices, stop the search and return to the normal Meowfficer Farming process. (The actual count is determined by the record table below. If the record table is empty, stops after finding X devices. If there are Y devices in the record, stops after finding X-Y devices.)
Set to 0 for no limit, search will continue until AP is insufficient.

SirenDetectorSearch_FoundZones.name: Found Siren Detection Device Zones
SirenDetectorSearch_FoundZones.help: Zones where Siren Detection Devices have been found. If the device in a zone has been used, you can manually delete that zone's record.

_info.name: Corrosion 1 Leveling
_info.help:
Consume Combat Supply Vouchers to gain large amounts of EXP and small amounts of Action Points
It is recommended to bring 1-2 preloaded carriers to obtain the highest hourly income.

Some safety restrictions of the original Alas have been lifted, please set parameters carefully

TargetZone.name: Target Zone
TargetZone.help: Only attack the designated zone, can be used to avoid zone refresh issues caused by game bugs

OperationCoinsPreserve.name: Preserve X Combat Supply Vouchers
OperationCoinsPreserve.help: When Combat Supply Vouchers are lower than X, run Meowfficer Farming. Not recommended to modify.

MinimumActionPointReserve.name: Preserve X Action Points
MinimumActionPointReserve.help: Give it a try, the bicycle turns into a motorcycle. Yukikaze-sama has given the luck to Commander nanoda, go for it nanoda!

ExecuteFixedPatrolScan.name: Forced Fleet Movement
ExecuteFixedPatrolScan.help: Warm reminder from Yukikaze-sama: After enabling, the fleet will be forced to move to prevent not finding Akashi. Commander, you don’t want to crash because you can’t find Akashi nanoda? Enable this function and easily reach 500,000 nautical miles per month nanoda. What are you waiting for, Commander?

Cl1Filter.name: Akashi Purchase Filter
Cl1Filter.help: By default, only Action Points are purchased nanoda. If you want to also buy purple coins, set it to ‘ActionPoint > PurpleCoins’

RecordNonCL1AP.name: Record Non-Corrosion 1 AP Sources
RecordNonCL1AP.help: When enabled, AP acquisition data from all sources (such as Akashi shop purchases) will be recorded. When disabled, AP data will only be recorded during Corrosion 1 Leveling tasks, ignoring AP gained during other tasks or manual operations.

_info.name: Siren Research Device Bug Exploit Beta
_info.help: Options for configuring the Siren Research Device and its bug exploits

SirenResearch_Enable.name: Enable Siren Research Device
SirenResearch_Enable.help:
After enabling, use purple coins to convert to yellow coins through the Siren Research Device
Sufficient nautical miles are needed to sustain the purple coin consumption

SirenBug_Enable.name: Enable Siren Research Device Bug Exploit
SirenBug_Enable.help:
Use the Siren Research Device bug to unlimitedly obtain Siren Research Device resources in high-Corrosion zones
Before enabling this function, you need to enable the "Siren Research Device" function first, otherwise it will not take effect.

SirenBug_Type.name: Target Zone Type
SirenBug_Type.help: Choose whether the target zone is a safe zone or a normal zone.

SirenBug_Zone.name: Bug Exploit Zone Name or ID
SirenBug_Zone.help:
Designate high-Corrosion zones where Siren Research Devices have spawned
Supports zone ID, CN/EN/JP/TW zone names, e.g. "51", "NA Ocean SE Sector E"
Fill in default value 0, or clear the value to cancel

SirenBug_Grid.name: Map Coordinates of the Device
SirenBug_Grid.help:
Specify the coordinates of the Siren Research Device on the map. If empty, will scan the map to find it.
Coordinate format is an uppercase letter for column + Arabic numeral for row, e.g. "B10" means column 2, row 10.
The top-left grid is "A1". Column increases by one moving right, row increases by one moving down.

SirenBug_SyncDailyCount.name: 同步每日利用次数
SirenBug_SyncDailyCount.help: 同步每日已利用塞壬研究装置 Bug 的次数

DisableTaskSwitchDuringBug.name: Disable Scheduler Task Switching During Bug Exploit
DisableTaskSwitchDuringBug.help:
Temporarily disable the scheduler's task switching check during bug exploitation to avoid being interrupted by commission, daily and other tasks.
Enable this option if the bug exploit process is often interrupted by other due tasks.

SirenBug_DailyCount.name: Siren Research Device Bug Exploit Count
SirenBug_DailyCount.help: The number of times the Siren Research Device bug has been exploited. A corresponding number of seconds will be waited based on this value before each scan.

SirenBug_DailyCountRecord.name: Last Siren Research Device Bug Exploit Time

SirenBug_CountLimit.name: Auto-collect when bug exploit count reaches this value (0 to disable)
SirenBug_CountLimit.help:
Note: This may cause the Siren Research Device to disappear. You bear the consequences if it disappears.
When the bug exploit count reaches the set value, use the current fleet to block enemy ships and use another fleet to collect resources.

SirenBug_CrossDay.name: Pause Bug Exploit During Day Change (23:55-00:05)
SirenBug_CrossDay.help: Bug exploitation is paused from 23:55 to 00:05 the next day to avoid crashes caused by day-change resets/disconnections.

SirenBug_AutoDisable.name: Auto-Disable Bug Exploit When No Research Device Found
SirenBug_AutoDisable.help: In case the device disappears, the auto-disable function avoids wasting Action Points by repeatedly entering the zone.

_info.name: Operation Siren Fleet EXP Check
_info.help:
Check whether all ships in the sortie fleet have gained full experience, and if so, send a push notification.
You need to configure "Error Push Settings" in Alas settings first.

TargetLevel.name: Push when all ships can level up to this level (0 means no limit)
TargetLevel.help: When all ships have accumulated enough experience to reach the specified level, a push notification is triggered.

LastRun.name: Last EXP Check Time (auto-recorded)
LastRun.help: Records the time of last check to prevent repeated runs, check interval is 1 day. This value is auto-recorded and generally does not need manual modification.

DelayAfterFull.name: Delay Task After Reaching Target Level
DelayAfterFull.help: When full experience is detected, this task will be delayed for the specified duration.

_info.name: Smart Scheduling
_info.help:
Operation Siren smart scheduling function, used to coordinate switching between Corrosion 1 Leveling and yellow coin replenishment tasks.
Once enabled, it will automatically switch between different tasks and send push notifications based on coins and Action Points.

Some safety restrictions of the original Alas have been lifted, please set parameters carefully

UseSmartSchedulingOperationCoinsPreserve.name: Obtain X Combat Supply Vouchers
UseSmartSchedulingOperationCoinsPreserve.help:
When enabled, will use the 'Obtain X Combat Supply Vouchers' configuration below. When disabled, will use the Corrosion 1 Leveling yellow coin retention configuration.
When disabled, Action Points are used for control.
When enabled, yellow coins are used for control.

OperationCoinsPreserve.name: Corrosion 1 Leveling: Preserve X Combat Supply Vouchers
OperationCoinsPreserve.help: When Combat Supply Vouchers are lower than X, run yellow coin replenishment task. Not recommended to modify.

ActionPointPreserve.name: Meowfficer Farming: Preserve X Action Points
ActionPointPreserve.help: Stop when Action Points are lower than X, and automatically open AP boxes. X includes AP in boxes. It is recommended to preserve 1000 AP for Corrosion 1 Leveling.

OperationCoinsReturnThreshold.name: Obtain X Combat Supply Vouchers
OperationCoinsReturnThreshold.help: During the yellow coin acquisition task, obtain (increase) X Combat Supply Vouchers in total, then return to Corrosion 1 Leveling.

EnableMeowfficerFarming.name: Enable Meowfficer Farming
EnableMeowfficerFarming.help: Whether to enable Meowfficer Farming task for yellow coin replenishment in Smart Scheduling

EnableObscure.name: Enable Obscured Zone
EnableObscure.help: Whether to enable Obscured Zone task for yellow coin replenishment in Smart Scheduling

EnableAbyssal.name: Enable Abyssal Zone
EnableAbyssal.help: Whether to enable Abyssal Zone task for yellow coin replenishment in Smart Scheduling

EnableStronghold.name: Enable Siren Stronghold
EnableStronghold.help: Whether to enable Siren Stronghold task for yellow coin replenishment in Smart Scheduling

MeowStartEarlyMode.name: Month-End AP Auto-Cleanup Mode
MeowStartEarlyMode.help: Aggressive (×0.8): Start later, saves AP but may miss refresh; Balanced (×1.2): Normal advance, balances safety and efficiency; Conservative (×1.5): Start earlier, prioritizes safety but may waste AP

MeowStartEarlyEnable.name: Enable Month-End AP Auto-Cleanup
MeowStartEarlyEnable.help: Based on historical AP consumption rate, automatically determine whether to start the Meowfficer Farming task early to clean up excess AP at month-end.

_info.name: Operation Siren Task Delay
_info.help: Within the configurable time period before the daily 0:00 server reset, Corrosion 1 and Meowfficer Farming tasks will be automatically delayed until the reset at 0:00 the next day is completed.

TriggerMinutesBeforeReset.name: Advance Trigger Time (Minutes)
TriggerMinutesBeforeReset.help: How many minutes before daily 0:00 to trigger task delay, range is 1-60 minutes, default is 5 minutes

TaskDict.name: task list
TaskDict.help: Alas will automatically export the list

TechnologyStatus.name: Technology list
TechnologyStatus.help: Alas will automatically export the list

_info.name: semi-automatic click
_info.help:
It is useful when attacking unadapted levels, which can reduce a lot of manual operations.
Alas will help you click to prepare for battle, click to settle the battle, skip the plot, automatically retire, and close various pop-up windows. You just need to select the enemy manually.

EnterMap.name: Automatically click to enter picture preparation
EnterMap.help: Before using it, you need to prepare the attack team

_info.name: Big world semi-automatic
_info.help:
It is useful when attacking the abyss of the big world (red treasure box map) or completing the main line of the big world, which can reduce a lot of manual operations.
Alas will help you click to prepare for the battle, click to settle the battle, skip the plot, and close various pop-up windows. You just need to manually select enemies and manually switch sea areas.

RepairShip.name: Automatically repair ships when approaching port
RepairShip.help:
After manually moving the team to the port, Alas will help repair the ship
After the repair is completed, the team needs to move out of the port within 30 seconds, otherwise the ship will be repaired again.

SelectEnemy.name: Clear nearby enemies and supplies
SelectEnemy.help: Clean up nearby enemies and supplies. After cleaning, you will find new enemies or supplies. This can usually clean up the entire sea area. If there are any omissions or click errors, you need to solve them manually.

_info.name: Event story
_info.help: Complete the event plot. It is only applicable to activities on and after the launch time of 20241219. Please wait for about 3 minutes.

_info.name: Disassemble equipment box
_info.help: Dismantle the equipment box in the warehouse, start it after the configuration is completed and wait.

PurpleBoxLimit.name: Keep X number of purple equipment boxes of each type

BlueBoxLimit.name: Keep X equipment boxes of each blue color

WhiteBoxLimit.name: Keep X boxes of each type of white equipment

_info.name: Performance testing
_info.help:
Test which screenshot scheme and control scheme is faster, speed varies based on emulator and computer configuration
After the test is completed, select the fastest screenshot and control scheme in "Alas" - "Simulator Settings"

DeviceType.name: Device type
DeviceType.plone_cloud_with_adb: Cloud mobile phone has public network ADB
DeviceType.phone_cloud_without_adb: Cloud mobile phone without public network ADB
DeviceType.android_phone_vmos: Android real machine VMOS virtual machine

_info.name: Uncensor
_info.help:
Only for CN Server. This tool will:
- Download uncensor files
- Push files to the emulator
- Restart the game client

Repository.name: Uncensor Repository
Repository.help:
Generally no modification is required.
Repository https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneUncensored
Domestic mirror (default) https://e.coding.net/llop18870/alas/AzurLaneUncensored.git

_info.name: Game Manager
_info.help: Semi-finished product, only implements force-closing the game and auto-login.

AutoRestart.name: Auto Login
AutoRestart.help: Automatically log into the game after it is force-closed

ScheduledEmulatorRestart.name: Restart the simulator regularly
ScheduledEmulatorRestart.help: Once enabled, the emulator will automatically restart at specified intervals to avoid memory leaks or lagging caused by long-term running. The restart will wait until the current task is completed before executing it.

RestartIntervalHours.name: Restart interval (hours)
RestartIntervalHours.help: Automatically restart the simulator every few hours.

_info.name: Task status
_info.help: Stores the internal state of the task, which can be manually cleared when the task is abnormal.

Toast.DisableTranslateMode: Click here to turn off translation mode

AddAlas.FileExist: A configuration file with the same name already exists, please enter a different name.
AddAlas.InvalidChar: The configuration file name cannot contain any of the following characters: .\/:*?"<>|
AddAlas.InvalidPrefixTemplate: The configuration file name cannot start with template

AppManage.NameExist: A configuration file with the same name already exists, please enter a different name.
AppManage.InvalidChar: The configuration file name cannot contain any of the following characters: .\/:*?"<>|
AppManage.InvalidPrefixTemplate: The configuration file name cannot start with template
AppManage.OverrideWarning: Existing configuration files will be overwritten
AppManage.Name: Configuration name

Update.UpdateWait: Wait for all Alas to complete the current task
Update.UpdateFailed: Update failed, error log can be found in ./log/*_gui.txt
Update.Author: Author
Update.DisabledWarn: The update module is not enabled, you need to manually restart Alas to update

Remote.NotRunning: Not running, the connection to the server is lost or the server is offline
Remote.NotEnable: Not enabled, set the webui password in deploy.yaml and enable remote control
Remote.SSHNotInstall: There is no ssh tool in the system, please refer to the tutorial to download or install ssh
